諗住買部新notebook玩game同做少少graphic
想問下大家意見
邊部好?

1. The New Razer Blade (2017)
i7-7700HQ/16GB RAM/512GB/NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 (6GB GDDR5 VRAM)

2. Surface Book 增強版
i7-6600U/16GB RAM/512GB/GTX 965M (2GB)

3. Macbook Pro 15" (2017)
2.8GHz 四核心 Intel Core i7/16GB RAM/512GB/Radeon Pro 555 (2GB)
